_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: JH-2-079-c responded the least to all three drugs...exhibited a dramatic reduction in cell viability after five days in culture...combination therapy...significantly impeded tumor growth in vivo
details: Responded the least to all three drugs tested and exhibited dramatic reduction in cell viability after five days in culture with trabectedin plus olaparib or plus mirdametinib. Combination therapy with trabectedin plus olaparib (P < 0.05) and trabectedin plus mirdametinib (P < 0.05) significantly impeded tumor growth in vivo
